name: Slimelon
short_description: Try to defeat the chaos generated by a multitude of slimes, each one cuter (almost) than the other. Discover all the fusions, collect them... And try to be the best (temporary) slime breeder! Watch out, it's an addictive arcade game!
detailed_description:
Being a (temporary) manager of a slime farm is not always easy, but it's up to you to prove yourself and try to overcome the chaos generated by a multitude of slimes, each one cuter (almost) than the other. . Discover all the fusions, collect them... And try to be the best (temporary) slime breeder!

FEATURES:

-An addictive arcade game

-Collect around ninety slimes and fill your slimedex

-Have fun merging different slimes to discover what it will look like

-Discover the unique personalities of each

-Make a maximum score and show off in front of your friends.
